caption:
The balcony upgrade series pt.2! 🎨 I haven’t been so excited for a before-after EVER!!

After painting my balcony yellow it was time to transform this bistro set to complete the space🪑This upcycling was insipired and made possible by @‌gamma.belgie and my community 🙏🏻 (publicity)

I’d been on the hunt for a bistro set for my terrace for AGES, the small table I own now just flops closed whenever it feels like it (with spilled beverages and broken plates of food as a result). I’ve had this design in the back of my mind for a while now and @‌gamma.belgie helped me bring my vision to reality!

What you need:
✨ secondhand furniture
✨ brushes & a roller
✨ tape measure
✨ masking tape
✨ a good adhesive primer
✨ paints in your favorite colours, I used these:
 * Desert Daisy Y0832-5016
 * HEX B0A6DF
 * HEX 74070E

Start off with cleaning your object, you don’t want any cat hair or dust to get mixed into your paint.

Then, apply one layer of primer. This really makes the paint stick, so it’s important not to skip this step.

Next I measured the placement of my stripes (I kind of freewheeled a bit though, but the perfectionists among us will love to get the maximum out of this step).

Now finally the colorful part! Apply one or two coats of your colours of choice, at least two coats for a darker shade of paint. Otherwise you risk still seeing the primer through the paint.

Lastly, let the paint dry completely (at least 24h) before you tape on it again to finish your last block of colour. At last you get to strip the tape away (warning: satisfying). This is where the magic happens.

Now you get to enjoy your colorful eyecatcher 💛

#samenmetgamma #upcycling #interiorforyou #interiordesign #homemakeover
